family_summary: Repair bundle narrowed to the Asaba massacre as the best direct-violence episode currently supportable without collapsing famine and blockade mortality into the baseline DR. Whole-war starvation and deprivation remain outside dr_v1_direct. Onitsha/Asaba crossing battles were reviewed for combatant comparison, but the available pass did not recover publishable combatant death totals tied to the same episode frame.
notes: This overwrite intentionally excludes famine, blockade, and other indirect mortality from dr_v1_direct unless an episode-specific source explicitly classifies deaths as direct violence.
